历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9531 → 9011 → 7566 → 10856 → 16576, showing an overall backward trend. Especially in 2024, the first year of the new college entrance examination, the ranking moved backward from 7566 to 10856, and in 2025 it further significantly moved backward to 16576, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9000 positions in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 16576. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi was 167 in 2021, 169 in 2022, 158 in 2023, 158 in 2024, and 187 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 190, a slight increase of 3 students (+1.6%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion, having a minor impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 49th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 49 and 59. In 2026, it slightly rose compared to 2025 (52nd), overall remaining in the top 50 nationally. Reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 94th (average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level. In recent years, there have been no significant records of enrollment gaps or sharp drops, indicating stable application psychology. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country) and Civil Engineering is A, both flagship disciplines of the university. Corresponding enrollment majors such as Transportation and Civil Engineering have strong disciplinary competitiveness, providing sustained attraction for students interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly matching the university's advantageous engineering directions. Social popularity for Civil Engineering and Architecture majors has significantly cooled (clearly discouraged), potentially lowering the minimum admission ranking for related civil engineering majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangxi general college entrance examination is 474,900, with an estimated Physics Category of about 268,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 0.5% compared to 2025 (266,000), slightly intensifying competition. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the Southwest region. Jiangxi Province is in the East China region, so cross-province applications need to consider regional preference factors. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi accounts for a small proportion (about 190 out of the national total), which is a normal cross-province enrollment scale, with no significant regional fluctuation signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1.6%), a slight increase in local Physics Category candidates (+0.5%), a slight rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (52nd to 49th), and the polarization of engineering major popularity (high heat for Computer/Electrical, cooling for Civil Engineering), it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to slightly move backward from the 2025 baseline of 16576. The predicted minimum ranking is about 16756, with a range of 16256–17256.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<16256), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>17256), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 3 with Tier 2 as a supplement.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 1801 → 1990 → 1880 → 2810 → 2443. In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao, the ranking shifted from 1880 to 2810 (+930 places), and in 2025 it rebounded to 2443 (-367 places), with a fluctuation range of 367–930 places in the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 2443 places. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi was 10 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16 students, a slight increase of 1 student (+6.7%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 49th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 49th and 59th in recent years, with a slight rise from 52nd in 2025, overall at the top 50 level nationwide. Reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 94th (average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level. No significant admission breaks or sharp drops have been observed in recent years, and the application psychology is relatively stable. The university is strong in engineering, but the History Category majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Foreign Languages and Literature, Public Administration, Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages, etc.) lack direct A-class discipline support, making their academic appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has divided social popularity (both recommended and discouraged). Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese major is socially recommended. Journalism and Communication major is clearly discouraged. Foreign Languages and Literature major is generally neutral. In 2026, the total number of Jiangxi Gaokao examinees is 474,900, with an estimated 207,000 in History Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (206,000), indicating slightly intensified competition. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the Southwest region. Jiangxi is in the East China region, so cross-province applications require consideration of regional preferences. As a science and engineering university, its History Category majors and enrollment numbers are small (about 16 students), making it a supplementary enrollment, with overall application popularity relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as significant historical ranking fluctuations (a large drop in 2024 followed by a rebound in 2025), a slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+6.7%), a small increase in local History Category examinees (+0.5%), a slight rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and divided popularity of liberal arts majors (Law divided, Journalism discouraged), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift downward from the 2025 baseline of 2443. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2556, with a range of 2173–2939.
